subject: (no subject)
body:
read the times interview. I would think about pointing to the stormy daniels. denial by trump his staff and aides. would it have made sense to go back to them? no would they admit no did they admit no, did they obfuscate yes. did they deny , yes so checking with the subject when you have to goods only confuses the reader ?
